chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP No.D–2907 of 2025 ________________________________________________ DATE: ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(s) OF JUDGE(s) ________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection No.1 & 2 2. For hearing of main case 21-07-2025 Mr. Ramiz Nasim, Advocate for Petitioners Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General SI Muhammad Aftab of FIA Immigration Karachi DSP Ayaz Ahmed Pandhiani, Foreign Registration Office Special Branch SIP Jawaid Akhtar FRO/SB KYC DSP Raza Mian Legal-II --------------- Learned Assistant Attorney General files comments on behalf of Respondents No.2 to 5, which are taken on record. From the comments, it reflects that the following documents are required to travelling abroad and thereafter, they have no objection for safe travelling. i. Travel Permits issued from the High Commission of Bangladesh; ii. Order from the concerned Home Department; iii. Letter from Foreign Registration Office, Special Branch, Karachi having the request for their deportation; iv. Travel permit issued by Special Branch; v. A letter issued from Additional Inspector General Police to Foreign Registration Office. Counsel for the Petitioner submits that the Petitioner will submit the above documents within a week, thereafter, the Respondents are directed to proceed in accordance with law. Accordingly, the Petition stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE FAIZAN/
